prompts.name: Transcript Cleanup
prompts.description: Corrects speech-to-text errors, fixes medical terminology, removes filler words.

prompts.name: Assessment & Plan
prompts.description: Generates a problem-oriented Assessment and Plan from the transcript.

prompts.name: Shift Handoff (SBAR)
prompts.description: Generates an SBAR-format shift handoff summary for safe patient care transitions.

prompts.name: History of Present Illness (HPI)
prompts.description: Generates a chronological History of Present Illness from the transcript.

prompts.name: After Visit Summary
prompts.description: Generates a brief takeaway summary for the patient with a focus on practical to-do's.

prompts.name: Teaching (Clinical Pearl)
prompts.description: Extracts a brief clinical pearl and poses a socratic follow-up question.
